mechanism_narrative: Persistently low federal funds rates reduce the discount rate applied to future corporate earnings, generating positive forward equity returns over a one-month horizon.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.02 over any 2-year rolling window, or positive returns occur in less than 50% of months when FEDFUNDS is flat.

mechanism_narrative: When the unemployment rate exceeds 9.0%, consumer spending growth decelerates sharply, reducing corporate revenue expectations and driving negative S&P 500 returns over the next five trading days.
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns are positive in more than 65% of triggered instances, or the signal loses predictive power with Rank IC below 0.01 when unemployment remains above 9.0% for consecutive months.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous month-over-month increases in retail sales and housing starts indicate synchronized consumer demand recovery, which translates into positive equity returns over a quarter-long horizon.
failure_condition: The joint signal produces negative forward returns in more than 60% of cases, or the interaction term fails to improve out-of-sample R-squared by more than 0.5% over a 3-year walk-forward test.

mechanism_narrative: Rising industrial production reflects expanding manufacturing capacity and supply-side momentum, which supports corporate profit margins and generates positive forward returns over a one-month horizon.
failure_condition: The signal reverses direction during supply-chain constrained periods, or Rank IC drops below 0.03 when capacity utilization exceeds 85%.

mechanism_narrative: When the consumer price index exceeds 217.0, rising input costs compress corporate margins and trigger expectations of monetary tightening, producing negative equity returns over the next five trading days.
failure_condition: Forward returns remain positive in more than 60% of triggered months, or the threshold effect vanishes when energy prices are stable.

mechanism_narrative: A simultaneous increase in total nonfarm payrolls and a decline in the unemployment rate signals robust labor market tightening, which boosts consumer confidence and drives positive equity returns over a quarter.
failure_condition: The joint signal fails to predict positive returns in more than 55% of cases, or the interaction effect is statistically insignificant with p-value greater than 0.10 in a multivariate regression over a 3-year window.

mechanism_narrative: Positive quarter-over-quarter growth in real GDP reflects underlying economic expansion, which directly supports corporate earnings growth and generates positive forward equity returns over a one-month horizon.
failure_condition: Rank IC remains below 0.02 over any 2-year rolling window, or positive GDP growth coincides with negative forward returns in more than 60% of observations.

mechanism_narrative: When housing starts fall below 550,000 units, the construction sector enters a contraction phase that drags down related industrial output and consumer sentiment, producing negative equity returns over the next five trading days.
failure_condition: The signal produces positive forward returns in more than 65% of triggered instances, or the threshold loses predictive power when mortgage rates decline concurrently.
